description: HAVINGはSQLでGROUP BYによる集約後の結果に条件を指定する句です。WHEREが集約前の行を絞るのに対し、HAVINGはCOUNTやSUMなどの集約値に対して絞り込みを行います。

example_natural.english: Show customers having more than ten orders.
example_natural.japanese: 注文が10件より多い顧客を表示してください。

example_programming.body:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM orders
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10;

from collections import Counter
orders = [1, 1, 2, 2, 2, 3]
counts = Counter(orders)
filtered = {k: v for k, v in counts.items() if v > 1}
print(filtered)

Dim dict As New Dictionary
For Each o In orders
  dict(o.cId) = dict(o.cId) + 1
Next
For Each key In dict.Keys
  If dict(key) > 10 Then
    Debug.Print key
  End If
Next
